title: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: An intrinsic value estimate for T. Rowe Price (TROW) based on a 10-year discounted cash flow model. Driven by exceptional free cash flow and a capital-light model, the stock appears significantly undervalued.
methodology: 10-year Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model projecting current Free Cash Flow ($1.86B) forward with a moderate 6% growth rate (in line with recent revenue growth) and a 9.0% discount rate given its beta of 1.55.
